Josh Shapiro.tagline: Pragmatic Democrat: public schools, healthcare protection, abortion rights, economic development
Josh Shapiro.description: Modeled as a center-left incumbent emphasizing public education, healthcare protection, abortion access, workforce development, police hiring, and business-friendly economic development.

Stacy Garrity.tagline: Trump-aligned Republican: lower taxes, border security, spending restraint, pro-business growth
Stacy Garrity.description: Modeled as a conservative Republican emphasizing tax relief, economic growth, spending restraint, stricter immigration enforcement, and alignment with national Republican policy priorities.
